op.title: Borg lifestyle discussion
op.body: saw an article about borg shit in programmer's digest and it peaked my interest. Anyone here into that? How did you start?

replies.body: Sorry to rezbump a week old thread, but I did some work at Sandia and Los Alamos in the 50s on mobile computing platforms. We shelved those projects though, some of the designs got bought out by RobCo. Now that I'm retired, I've been working on haptic keyboards. My wife things it's a waste of time but she appreciates how my finger dexterity has improved. Haha.

Hell yeah, I never get to talk about borging. Yeah I'm Army engineering corps. I studied the shit out of how the t45 and the t51 work. Got it down to a science. At home I've got something I call my chrome arm. It's an exoskeletal frame that mounts at the shoulder and connects all the way down to the fingers. I tested and it makes me twice as strong, number was 2.13 times as strong actually last time I checked. It's cool as fuck, man. I wish I could attach pictures
ENJOY YOUR COMMUNISM TRAITOR. I HOPE IT WAS WORTH IT
Cope harder guys, the People's Liberation Loveboat sails strong :-)

>traitor
Bro we’re all about to get vaporized, chill tf out
what the fuck is a chinese
